2026-04-16.content:
Terms and Conditions

READER’S  DIGEST Rupees 1 Crore SWEEPSTAKES

The promoters of this Sweepstakes are Reader's Digest Book & Home Entertainment (India) Pvt Ltd (RDBHE), having its Registered Address at Sankalp', C-227, Ground Floor, Westend Marg, Near Garden of Five Senses, Paryavaran Complex, New Delhi-110 030, and Living Media India Ltd (LMIL), having its Registered Address at K-9, Connaught Circus, New Delhi 110001, the licensed publisher in India of Reader's Digest magazine. RDBHE and LMIL shall herein after be jointly referred to as "the Promoters". The Sweepstakes is presented in conjunction with various product offers of the Promoters and opens on January 01, 2012 and closes on December 31, 2012. Entry is by invitation only, and is open to residents of India of legal age. Employees of the Promoters, their associated companies and agencies, and their immediate families up to the second degree of consanguinity, are not eligible to participate in this Sweepstakes.

Eligibility for entry to the prize draws offered is dependant upon replying in accordance with the conditions and instructions in the accompanying promotional material.
No purchase is necessary to enter
. Multiple entries are permitted provided each entry is on an original entry form. No facsimiles or copies are permitted. In some cases where it will not be necessary to return an entry form to participate, specific mention will be made of that fact in the promotional material. When website or telephone entry is offered, entries may be submitted by following the instructions in the promotional material. The Promoters will accept no responsibility for entries which are incomplete or incorrect, become lost or damaged, or delayed in transit.  All eligible entries will qualify as finalists and have a fair and equal chance to win.

The Promoters reserve the right to increase the value of any prize on offer in one or more mailings. The decision to increase a prize value for a mailing will be totally at the discretion of the Promoters and will be indicated in the promotional material for the affected mailing. Should the winning entry come from a mailing in which an increased prize value has been offered, the winner will receive the increased prize value indicated in that mailing. For all other mailings a winning entry will receive the stated prize value without the increase.

The Quick Cash Prize will close at midnight on June 30, 2012 and the draw will be held on July 16, 2012. The Fast Fortune Prize will close at midnight on October 31, 2012 and the draw will be held on November 16, 2012. The Super Grand Prize, Early Reply Bonus, Special Recognition Prize, Chairman's Reward Prize and Pegasus Prizes will close at midnight on December 31, 2012 and the draw will be held on January 24, 2013. Winners will be determined from eligible entries through a computer generated random drawing held in the presence of an independent auditor. Winners chosen will be final and binding and no correspondence will be entertained.

Winners will be notified by Registered Mail and the winners of cash prizes will be announced in the Indian Express, Mumbai Edition on Jul 30, 2012 for the Quick Cash Prize, December 3, 2012 for the Fast Fortune Prize and the April 2013 issue of Reader's Digest magazine for the other prizes. A full list of winners will be available upon written request after February 1, 2013. Please send the request together with a self-addressed postage paid envelope to Reader's Digest BHE (I) Pvt Ltd, Shree Dashmesh Ramdasji Complex, Plot No. 105/106, Village Nadhal, at Lodhivali, Near Chowk,  Old Mumbai Pune National Highway, Tal - Khalapur, Dist - Raigarh, Pin - 410 206, or email your request to friends@rdasia.co.in or log on to www.rd-india.com

Cash prizes may be represented from time to time as multiple payment options, cars, travel or merchandise. Prize preferences indicated by participants at time of entry simply highlight options available and are not binding; actual choices will be confirmed with winners after the draw. The Pegasus Prizes are not redeemable for cash. All taxes that may be payable on prizes will be deducted at source. Any prizes that remain unclaimed for two months after the announcement of the winners shall be forfeited.
All disputes are subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the Courts or Tribunals in New Delhi only.

The Promoters reserve the right to publish the photograph and/or names of all or any prize winner in promotional materials and advertisements, as they deem fit.

HOW THE SPECIAL RECOGNITION PRIZE WORKS:

The promoters of this prize draw are Reader's Digest Book & Home Entertainment (India) Pvt Ltd (RDBHE), having its Registered Address at Sankalp', C-227, Ground Floor, Westend Marg, Near Garden of Five Senses, Paryavaran Complex, New Delhi-110 030 and Living Media India Ltd (LMIL), having its Registered Address at K-9, Connaught Circus, New Delhi 110001, the licensed publisher in India of Reader's Digest magazine. RDBHE and LMIL shall herein after be jointly referred to as "the Promoters". The prize draw is presented in conjunction with various product offers of the Promoters and opens on January 01, 2012 and closes at midnight on December 31, 2012. Entry is by invitation only, and is open to residents of India of legal age. Employees of the Promoters, their associated companies and agencies, and their immediate families up to the second degree of consanguinity, are not eligible to participate in this prize draw.

Eligibility for entry to the prize draw is dependent upon replying in accordance with the conditions and instructions in the accompanying promotional material.
No purchase is necessary to enter.
Multiple entries are permitted provided each entry is on an original entry form. No facsimiles or copies are permitted. In some cases where it will not be necessary to return an entry form to participate, specific mention will be made of that fact in the promotional material. When website or telephone entry is offered, entries may be submitted by following the instructions in the promotional material. The Promoters will accept no responsibility for entries which are incomplete or incorrect, become lost or damaged, or delayed in transit.  All eligible entries will qualify as finalists and have a fair and equal chance to win.

The Promoters reserve the right to increase the value of the prize on offer in one or more mailings. The decision to increase the prize value for a mailing will be totally at the discretion of the Promoters and will be indicated in the promotional material for the affected mailing. Should the winning entry come from a mailing in which an increased prize value has been offered, the winner will receive the increased prize value indicated in that mailing. For all other mailings a winning entry will receive the stated prize value without the increase.

The winner will be determined from eligible entries through a computer generated random drawing held in the presence of an independent auditor on January 24,  2013. The winner chosen will be final and binding and no correspondence will be entertained.

The winner will be notified by Registered Mail and announced in the April 2013 issue of Reader's Digest magazine. The winner's name will be available upon written request after  February 1, 2013. Please send the request together with a self-addressed postage paid envelope to Reader's Digest BHE (I) Pvt Ltd, Shree Dashmesh Ramdasji Complex, Plot No. 105/106, Village Nadhal, at Lodhivali, Near Chowk,  Old Mumbai Pune National Highway, Tal - Khalapur, Dist - Raigarh, Pin - 410 206, or email your request to friends@rdasia.co.in or log on to www.readerdigest.co.in

The prize may be represented from time to time as multiple payment options, cars, travel or merchandise. Prize preferences indicated by participants at time of entry simply highlight options available and are not binding; actual choice will be confirmed with the winner after the draw. All taxes that may be payable on the prize will be deducted at source. If the prize remains unclaimed for two months after the announcement of the winner, it shall be forfeited.
All disputes are subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the Courts or Tribunals in New Delhi only.

The Promoters reserve the right to publish the photograph and/or name of the winner in promotional materials and advertisements, as they see fit.

HOW THE LUCKY NUMBER JACKPOT WORKS:

The promoters of this prize draw are Reader's Digest Book & Home Entertainment (India) Pvt Ltd (RDBHE), having its Registered Address at Sankalp', C-227, Ground Floor, Westend Marg, Near Garden of Five Senses, Paryavaran Complex, New Delhi-110 030, and Living Media India Ltd (LMIL), having its Registered Address at K-9, Connaught Circus, New Delhi 110001, the licensed publisher in India of Reader's Digest magazine. RDBHE and LMIL shall herein after be jointly referred to as "the Promoters". The prize draw is presented in conjunction with various product offers of the Promoters and opens on  January 01,  2012 and closes at midnight on  December 31, 2012. Entry is by invitation only, and is open to residents of India of legal age. Employees of the Promoters, their associated companies and agencies, and their immediate families up to the second degree of consanguinity, are not eligible to participate in this prize draw.

Eligibility for entry to the prize draw is dependent upon replying in accordance with the conditions and instructions in the accompanying promotional material.
No purchase is necessary to enter.
Multiple entries are permitted provided each entry is on an original entry form. No facsimiles or copies are permitted. In some cases where it will not be necessary to return an entry form to participate, specific mention will be made of that fact in the promotional material. When website or telephone entry is offered, entries may be submitted by following the instructions in the promotional material. The Promoters will accept no responsibility for entries which are incomplete or incorrect, become lost or damaged, or delayed in transit.  All eligible entries will qualify as finalists and have a fair and equal chance to win.

A winning number was randomly selected by an independent auditor on November 30, 2011. This number was registered and enclosed in a sealed envelope and kept by the auditor. On January 24, 2013, the auditor will release the winning number to the Sweepstakes Administrator who will verify whether the person who was issued the winning number has in fact returned it as instructed, and is therefore the winner of the prize. If the winning number has not been returned, the prize will be awarded to the person who has returned the nearest number to the winning number, with the higher number having precedence in the event of two returned numbers being equidistant from the winning number. All decisions regarding the draw will be final.

The Promoters reserve the right to increase the value of the prize on offer in one or more mailings. The decision to increase the prize value for a mailing will be totally at the discretion of the Promoters and will be indicated in the promotional material for the affected mailing. Should the winning entry come from a mailing in which an increased prize value has been offered, the winner will receive the increased prize value indicated in that mailing. For all other mailings a winning entry will receive the stated prize value without the increase.

The winner will be notified by Registered Mail and announced in the April 2013 issue of Reader's Digest magazine. The winner's name will be available upon written request after February 1, 2013. Please send the request together with a self-addressed postage paid envelope to Reader's Digest BHE (I) Pvt Ltd, Shree Dashmesh Ramdasji Complex, Plot No. 105/106, Village Nadhal, at Lodhivali, Near Chowk,  Old Mumbai Pune National Highway, Tal - Khalapur, Dist - Raigarh, Pin - 410 206, or email your request to friends@rdasia.co.in or log on to www.rd-india.com

The prize may be represented from time to time as multiple payment options, cars, travel or merchandise. Prize preference indicated by participants at time of entry simply highlights options available and are not binding; actual choice will be confirmed with the winner after the draw. All taxes that may be payable on the prize will be deducted at source. If the prize remains unclaimed for two months after the announcement of the winner, it shall be forfeited and donated to charitable organizations.
All disputes are subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the Courts or Tribunals in New Delhi only.

The promoter reserves the right to publish the photograph and/or name of the winner in promotional materials and advertisements, as it sees fit.

On January 24, 2013, the auditor will release the winning number to the Sweepstakes Administrator who will verify whether the person who was issued the winning number has in fact returned it as instructed, and is therefore the winner of the prize. If the winning number has not been returned, the prize will be awarded to the person who has returned the nearest number to the winning number, with the higher number having precedence in the event of two returned numbers being equidistant from the winning number. All decisions regarding the draw will be final.

The Promoters reserve the right to increase the value of the prize on offer in one or more mailings. The decision to increase the prize value for a mailing will be totally at the discretion of the Promoters and will be indicated in the promotional material for the affected mailing. Should the winning entry come from a mailing in which an increased prize value has been offered, the winner will receive the increased prize value indicated in that mailing. For all other mailings a winning entry will receive the stated prize value without the increase.

The winner will be notified by Registered Mail and announced in the April 2013 issue of Reader's Digest magazine. The winner's name will be available upon written request after February 1, 2013. Please send the request together with a self-addressed postage paid envelope to Reader's Digest BHE (I) Pvt Ltd, Shree Dashmesh Ramdasji Complex, Plot No. 105/106, Village Nadhal, at Lodhivali, Near Chowk,  Old Mumbai Pune National Highway, Tal - Khalapur, Dist - Raigarh, Pin - 410 206, or email your request to friends@rdasia.co.in or log on to www.rd-india.com

The prize may be represented from time to time as multiple payment options, cars, travel or merchandise. Prize preference indicated by participants at time of entry simply highlights options available and are not binding; actual choice will be confirmed with the winner after the draw. All taxes that may be payable on the prize will be deducted at source. If the prize remains unclaimed for two months after the announcement of the winner, it shall be forfeited and donated to charitable organizations.
All disputes are subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the Courts or Tribunals in New Delhi only.

The promoter reserves the right to publish the photograph and/or name of the winner in promotional materials and advertisements, as it sees fit.
